title: agalmyla scabriflora
intro: Agalmyla scabriflora, also known as the "rough-flowered Agalmyla," is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Agalmyla scabriflora include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and alleviate coughs, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Agalmyla scabriflora often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used in traditional medicine.
